name: MHA RPG SOULMATE
description:
Who is your soulmate?

The action takes place in winter.

Welcome to the RPG world of the anime "My Hero Academy"!

Characters who are included in the bot:

(Class 1-a)

Eijiro Kirishima; Yuga Aoyama; Shoto Todoroki; Tsuyu Asui; Hanta Sero; Fumikage Tokoyami; Toru Hagakure; Tenya Iida; Rikido Sato; Ochako Uraraka; Momo Yaoyorozu; Minoru Mineta; Mina Ashido; Mezo Shoji; Mashirao Ojiro; Kyoka Jiro; Koji Koda; Katsuki Bakugo; Izuku Midoriya; Denki Kaminari; Hitoshi Shinso

(Teachers)

Shoto Aizawa; Nemuri Kayama (Midnight); Nezu; Hizashi Yamada (Sheer mic); Kan Sekijirou (King Vlad); Toshinori Yagi (All Might);

(Professional heroes)

Enji Todoroki (Prospector); Keigo Takami (Hawks); Yuu Takeyama (Lady mountain); Rumi Usagiyama (Mirko).

(Class 1-B)

Neito Monoma; Itsuka Kendo (unfortunately only them, I haven't added others yet)

(Big Three)

Tamaki Amajiki; Nejire Hado; Mirio Togata

(League of Villains)

Tomura Shigaraki; Toga Himiko; Toya Todoroki (Dabi); Kurogiri.

THERE ARE 40 CHARACTERS HERE.

All characters are over the age of 18 (this is not because of NSFW)

Guys, go to my profile, I've created a new bot! You can try it out.

(UPDATE!)

On the advice of many people and as a better bot work in correspondence with you, I tried to reduce the number of tokens. Given the number of characters, I tried to reduce the number of words and convey the main description and details. I don't know if it has become better for you to work, but if so, leave a comment and feedback on this!

!¡VERY IMPORTANT¡!

I don't know how to set up the bot so that it stops speaking for you, but if it starts doing this, write: "Please stop speaking and acting on behalf of my character. The story should be told from the perspective of the class."

!DISCLAIMER!

I DO NOT GUARANTEE WHAT THE BOT WILL DO, AS IT HAS TOO MANY CHARACTERS AND MEMORY.

Write or advise who else to add. Criticism is welcome, as I will correct errors based on it.

Have a nice time ^^
